name: mcp-server-vizro
description: provides tools and templates to create a functioning Vizro chart or dashboard step by step

rating.reason: Documentation shows adequate basic functionality coverage but has significant inconsistencies and gaps. Tool names are clear and purposeful. Descriptions vary widely in quality - some provide good context (get_sample_data_info explains dataset purposes), while others are unclear or contain formatting issues (get_vizro_chart_or_dashboard_plan has confusing workflow instructions). Parameter documentation is mixed, with some having good descriptions and constraints (enums are well-defined) but others lacking clarity about their purpose or impact on behavior. Complex nested schemas lack sufficient explanation of their structure and usage.
